zh.lifeSummary: Umberge de Limoges於大約1134年出生在法國努維勒-阿吉泰豪-維安利莫格斯。她於大約1159年與Geoffrey De Lusignan Viii Seigneur of Moncontour在法國努維勒-阿吉泰豪-維安利莫格斯結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。她去世於大約1160年在以色列מחוז תל אביביפו享年28歲。

nameMeanings.name: Limoges
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Emile, Fernand, Gaston, Jacques, Monique, Muguette, Pierre, Rosaire.
French: habitational name from the city of Limoges and of several other places in the southwestern part of France.
History: Pierre Amand dit Jolicoeur and Limoges from Bordeaux in Gironde, France, married Catherine Grenier in Montreal, QC, in 1698.

nameMeanings.name: Umberge
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German: topographic or habitational name of unexplained origin.

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Deborah
meanings: Biblical name (meaning ‘bee’ in Hebrew), borne by the nurse of Rebecca (Genesis 35:8) and by a woman judge and prophet (Judges 4–5) who led the Israelites to victory over the Canaanites. It has always been popular as a Jewish name. It was in use among Christians by the mid 16th century and was taken up by the Puritans in the 17th century, in part because the bee was a symbol of industriousness. Since then it has enjoyed enormous popularity, peaking in the 1960s. Among other famous bearers is the actress  Deborah Kerr  (  1921–2007 ).

en.lifeSummary: Umberge de Limoges was born about 1134, in Limoges, Haute-Vienne, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, France. She married Geoffrey De Lusignan Viii Seigneur of Moncontour about 1159, in Limoges, Haute-Vienne, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, France. They were the parents of at least 1 son. She died about 1160, in Jaffa, Tel Aviv District, Israel, at the age of 28.

fr.lifeSummary: Umberge de Limoges est née environ 1134, à Limoges, Haute-Vienne, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, France. Elle a épousé Geoffrey De Lusignan Viii Seigneur of Moncontour environ 1159, à Limoges, Haute-Vienne, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, France. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Elle est décédée environ 1160, à Yafo, Tel Aviv District, Israël, à l’âge de 28 ans.

Sie hat um 1159 in Limoges, Haute-Vienne, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, Frankreich Geoffrey De Lusignan Viii Seigneur of Moncontour geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. ja.Of, Limoges, Haute-Vienne, France: フランスノウベレ-アクイティアインハウテ-ヴィエンリモジェズ
ja.Fontenay-le-Comte, Vendée, Pays de la Lo: フランスペイズ ド ラ ロイアーベンドeフォンテナイ-レ-コムト
ja.lifeSummary: Umberge de Limogesは約1134年にフランスノウベレ-アクイティアインハウテ-ヴィエンリモジェズで生まれた。約1159年にフランスノウベレ-アクイティアインハウテ-ヴィエンリモジェズでGeoffrey De Lusignan Viii Seigneur of Moncontourと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼女は約1160年にイスラエルמחוז תל אביביפוで28歳で死去した。

ko.Fontenay-le-Comte, Vendée, Pays de la Lo: 프랑스 파이스 데 라 로이르 븐드e 폰텐아이-레-코트
ko.lifeSummary: Umberge de Limoges(은)는 대략 1134년 프랑스 노우벨레-아키테인 하테-비니 리모그스에서 태어났다. 그녀는 대략 1159년 프랑스 노우벨레-아키테인 하테-비니 리모그스에서 Geoffrey De Lusignan Viii Seigneur of Moncontour(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1160년 이스라엘 מחוז תל אביב יפו에서 28세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Umberge de Limoges родилась около 1134 г. в местности лимогесь, хауте-виенн, ноувелле-аквитеин, Франция. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Geoffrey De Lusignan Viii Seigneur of Moncontour около 1159 г. в местности лимогесь, хауте-виенн, ноувелле-аквитеин, Франция. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Она умерла около 1160 г. в местности יפו, מחוז תל אביב, Израиль в возрасте 28 лет.
